title: Reign of Nether RTS
description: Minecraft reimagined as a real-time strategy game
body:
![new title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aacc26241182b2f87fa008274a0469789275445d.png) Reign of Nether transforms Minecraft into an entirely new game and genre, a classic RTS game like Warcraft, Starcraft or Age of Empires. Build your base, gather resources, train your army and fight epic battles! Support me with a donation! [https://buymeacoffee.com/solegendary](https://buymeacoffee.com/solegendary) Join the community on discord! https://discord.gg/jJV5zK3hT9
Trailer


**Play with Essential to host peer-to-peer!**
[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/937deb3103e9d19e13d34c61a71fc5630c6f58d7_0.webp)](https://essential.gg/x/reignofnether)
**OR Support our server host!**
[![](https://i.imgur.com/DZ5ZsAe.png)](https://lilypad.gg/reignofnether)

**Play one of three factions, each with their unique mechanics and styles** ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SoLegendary/reignofnether/1.19/src/main/resources/assets/reignofnether/textures/mobheads/villager.png)     Villagers The desperate alliance of villagers and illagers who have banded together to protect their home against invaders. Villager ingenuity combined with illager militarism make for a formidable army of warriors and spellcasters backed by farmers, builders and craftsmen. Transform the humble village into a fortress! ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SoLegendary/reignofnether/1.19/src/main/resources/assets/reignofnether/textures/mobheads/creeper.png)     Monsters The previously wild and untamed creatures of the overworld now brought together by mysterious forces. Raise the dead from graveyards, hatch spiders from nests and more. Monsters shun sunlight and can only safely venture outside at night, but once night falls, they should be feared just as they have been for ages past. ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SoLegendary/reignofnether/1.19/src/main/resources/assets/reignofnether/textures/mobheads/grunt.png)     Piglins The denizens of the nether who have come through portals to expand their empire. Piglins can only build on nether terrain, but wherever they expand the overworld is transformed into a visage of their home, turning grass into nylium and stone into netherrack. Conquer the overworld and let none stand in your way!
⚙️ Game Modes Change gamemodes by right clicking the gamemode button at the top right: ![Game mode selection](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5dae99484ced71c4e41f2e210920a267d9f9d78_0.webp) - 🏛️ **Classic:** The classic RTS experience in FFA or teams. Destroy all of your opponents' buildings to win. - 🏕️ **Wave Survival:** Survive brutal waves of enemies each night, solo or with allies. - 💠 **King of the Beacon:** Fight for control of a central Beacon. Unlock powerful auras and defend it to win. - 🏗️ **Sandbox:** Build a custom map by freely placing units and buildings

📜 Tutorial If you're brand new to the RTS genre, you may want to start by playing the single player tutorial. The **reign_of_nether_tutorial** map included in the downloads will get you started on how to play an RTS game and all the basics of the mod. Download it here: [https://edge.forgecdn.net/files/6373/511/reign_of_nether_tutorial.zip](https://edge.forgecdn.net/files/6373/511/reign_of_nether_tutorial.zip)

🎮 Playing a game To start a match, press F12 to go into RTS camera and use the top-right buttons to place your starting workers. Use **/rts-help** for a list of commands and controls Download the official map pack here: Download the official custom map pack here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reign-of-nether-rts-in-minecraft/files/7119668 These maps are intended for PvP matches (wave survival is disabled on them) and includes: - **Oceanborn** by @fgtrue  (2 Players) - **Berlingrad** by @fgtrue  (2 Players) - **Outlaw's Ridge** by @octanebula  (2 Players) - **Duality** by @octanebula  (2 Players) - **Fusion Delta** by @sandorm8 (2 Players) - **4Mountains** by @xxxtrigger50xxx (4 Players) - **4Rivers** by @aor1123  (4 Players) - **Caelum Insula** by @theblueallay  (King of the Hill, 4 Players) - **Essential Isles** by the Essential Mod Team (6 Players) - **Quicksand** by @fgtrue  (6 Players)
🏗️ Installation 1\. Install Forge 1.20.1: [https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.20.1.html](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.20.1.html) 2\. Download and add the Reign of Nether mod jar file to your Minecraft mods folder 3\. Launch Minecraft, selecting your installation as Forge 1.20.1 **When installing on a server, it's recommended to use these server.properties settings:** * view-distance=25 * spawn-monsters=false * spawn-npcs=false * spawn-protection=0 * gamemode=spectator For mod versions 1.1.3 and below, use Forge 1.19.2 instead
☁️ Experimental: Fog of War By using the command **/rts-fog enable/disable** you can toggle fog of war for all players on the server. This means that all chunks not within immediate range of your units and buildings are greyed out, and all mobs and block updates are not seen until you go to explore them. This is a staple of classic RTS games, but this mod has unfortunately seen many bugs and performance issues related to it, and so it has been labelled experimental. Tips for improving performance: * Optifine is not compatible! Enabling it with it installed will crash the game * Don't enable or disable it in the middle of a match * Reduce your chunk render distance Thanks to **omega9_6** for the title and icon design
